merged_events.event_description: The American Embassy at Port Louis was established upon Mauritius' attainment of independence, with William B. Hussey as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

evidence.quote: Diplomatic relations were established on March 12, 1968, when the American Embassy at Port Louis was established with William B. Hussey as Chargé d'Affaires at interim.

matched.notes: Perfect match. Both sources agree on 1968-03-12 as the date the American Embassy at Port Louis was established upon Mauritius' independence.
